annual_rate.notes: Kansas general/contract prejudgment interest is 10% fixed (K.S.A. 16-201(a)). For civil TORT actions filed on or after July 1, 2023, prejudgment interest is instead two percentage points below the K.S.A. 16-204(e)(1) judgment rate — currently 6.25% (8.25% − 2), variable, recomputed each July 1 (K.S.A. 16-201(b)). Verified 2026-07-11. Not legal advice.
